transcript: Baaahhh... Try me, they put me down, but I never cried out Why me? We're from the wise, don't put worth inside somebody that ain't tried They said I wouldn't make it out alive They told me I'm ready to go far, so I'm ready to go far and start walking It's why I gotta get them every time Gotta watch them bleed too Don't ever see it's over if I'm breathing Raise it to the moonlight and I'm speeding I'm ready to the stars Ready to go moonlight and I'm speeding I'm ready to the stars, ready to go far And start walking

timestamps.text: Baaahhh... Try me, they put me down, but I never cried out
Why me? We're from the wise, don't put worth inside somebody that ain't tried
They said I wouldn't make it out alive They told me I'm ready to go far, so I'm ready to go far and start walking
It's why I gotta get them every time
Don't ever see it's over if I'm breathing
Raise it to the moonlight and I'm speeding
Ready to go moonlight and I'm speeding I'm ready to the stars, ready to go far
